commands.review_summary:
The PR moves personal Codex CLI asset Doctor output from warnings to info, gates the `openclaw migrate codex --dry-run` recommendation on Codex migration-provider availability, and updates focused tests/docs/changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main routes the Codex asset notice through `Doctor warnings` and unconditionally recommends `openclaw migrate codex --dry-run`. I did not run the CLI because this review is read-only.

target.title: fix(doctor): classify Codex asset notice as info
target.body:
## Summary

- move personal Codex CLI asset notices out of the Doctor warnings group and emit them as Doctor info
- gate the `openclaw migrate codex --dry-run` recommendation on Codex migration-provider availability, with fallback guidance when it is not available
- update doctor/skills docs and focused regression coverage

Fixes #84859.
Fixes #84948.

## Verification

- `pnpm docs:list`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/emit-notes.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-native-assets.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/preview-warnings.test.ts src/commands/doctor-config-flow.test.ts --reporter=verbose`
- `/mnt/c/src/claws-hapi/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --reviewer codex --fallback-reviewer none`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: personal Codex CLI assets are now presented as Doctor info instead of Doctor warnings, and the `openclaw migrate codex --dry-run` line is only used when the Codex migration provider is available.
Real environment tested: WSL Ubuntu source checkout at commit `573395cde1`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor/emit-notes.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/codex-native-assets.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/preview-warnings.test.ts src/commands/doctor-config-flow.test.ts --reporter=verbose`.
Evidence after fix: 4 test files passed, 69 tests passed, including coverage for Doctor info routing and provider-unavailable migration guidance.
Observed result after fix: Codex native asset notices are emitted through the `Doctor info` note path, while other preview warnings remain in `Doctor warnings`.
What was not tested: full `openclaw doctor --non-interactive` was not used as proof because the full doctor command runs unrelated host health checks; the touched note collection/emission path was tested directly.
